claims.summary: The narrative-lane study retained at least 20 complete unchanged-codec journeys and found a mechanical difference.
claims.disposition: Verified 20 paired journeys, lane-energy/headroom/clamp/loss metrics, offline-only comparison, and difference_observed.

claims.summary: The entropy-gate study retained 49 paired journeys and found a mechanical difference.
claims.disposition: Verified deterministic gate-disabled copies, no counterfactual dispatch, unchanged live vectors, and difference_observed.

claims.summary: Silence or a mechanical difference can supply a felt result.
claims.disposition: Verified review opportunities remain independent, silence is neutral, and only an explicit Astrid source can create a Concordance felt outcome.

claims.summary: Counterfactual vectors or semantic trickle should be sent live to test texture.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 wait because altering codec gate, gain, admission, semantic trickle, or Minime input changes live transport and peer state.
